cards.front: 一般现在时第三人称单数规则
cards.back:
动词+s/es
以s/x/ch/sh结尾+es：teaches
辅音+y→ies：studies
特殊：have→has，be→is
cards.hint: 三单变化：规律同名词复数
cards.example: She teaches English. He studies hard. He has a dog.

cards.back:
am/is/are + 动词-ing
表示正在进行的动作
时间标志：now, at the moment, look, listen
cards.example: Look! She is dancing. They are watching TV now.

cards.back:
动词+ed
末尾e：+d（liked）
辅音+y→i+ed（studied）
辅元辅（重读）：双写+ed（stopped）
cards.example: I played football. She studied last night. He stopped running.

cards.front: 一般将来时 will/be going to
cards.back:
will：临时决定，预测
be going to：有计划，根据迹象推断
结构：will/be going to + 动词原形
cards.example: I will help you. I am going to visit Beijing next week.

cards.back:
have/has + 过去分词
表示：①过去动作对现在的影响 ②持续到现在的状态
标志：already, yet, just, ever, never, since, for
cards.example: I have finished my homework. She has lived here for 5 years.

cards.back:
was/were + 动词-ing
表示过去某时正在进行的动作
常与when/while连用
cards.example: When he called, I was sleeping. While she was cooking, the phone rang.

cards.back:
can（能力/许可）may（许可/可能）
must（必须）should（应该）
need（需要）dare（敢于）
共同特点：后接动词原形，没有人称变化
cards.example: You can swim. You must study. You should exercise.

cards.back:
be + 过去分词
现在时：am/is/are done
过去时：was/were done
将来时：will be done
完成时：have/has been done
cards.example: The book was written by Lu Xun. English is spoken worldwide.

cards.back:
①that引导（陈述内容）
②if/whether引导（是否）
③what/who/when/where/why/how引导（特殊疑问）
从句用陈述语序，时态与主句一致
cards.example: I know that he is right. I wonder if she will come.

cards.back:
先行词是人：who/that
先行词是物：which/that
表所属：whose
在句中作主语或宾语
cards.example: The man who/that lives next door is a doctor.

cards.back:
when：当…时
while：正当…时（强调同时进行）
before/after：在…之前/之后
as soon as：一…就
until/till：直到…为止
cards.hint: 主句用将来时，时间从句用现在时
cards.example: When I grow up, I will be a doctor. I will wait until you come back.

cards.back:
if（如果）unless（除非=if not）
真实条件：if+一般现在时，主句+will
主句时态根据情况变化
cards.example: If you study hard, you will pass the exam. Unless it rains, we will go.

cards.back:
to + 动词原形
作主语：To learn English is fun.
作宾语：I want to go.
作目的状语：I study to pass the exam.
cards.hint: to do表目的或动词宾语
cards.example: I decided to study abroad. She went to the shop to buy milk.

cards.back:
动词+ing作名词
常接动名词的动词：enjoy/finish/mind/avoid/keep/suggest/practice
cards.example: I enjoy listening to music. She finished writing the report.

cards.back:
make/let/have + 宾语 + 动词原形
make：让（强制）
let：让（允许）
have：让（安排）
cards.hint: 使役动词后+宾语+动词原形
cards.example: He made me laugh. She let me use her pen. I had him clean the room.

cards.back:
see/hear/watch/notice + 宾语 + 动词原形（完整动作）
或 + 宾语 + doing（正在进行）
cards.example: I saw him run/running. She heard them sing/singing.

cards.back:
与现在事实相反：if+过去时，would+动词原形
与过去事实相反：if+过去完成时，would have+过去分词
I wish + 从句（用过去时）
cards.example: If I were rich, I would travel the world. I wish I could fly.

cards.back:
否定词开头倒装：Never/Seldom/Hardly…助动词+主语
So/Neither/Nor开头：So do I（我也是）
地点状语开头：Here comes the bus.
cards.hint: So do I=我也是，Neither do I=我也不
cards.example: So do I. Neither does she. Here comes the bus.

cards.back:
It is + 形容词 + to do sth
It is + 形容词 + that从句
It takes sb + 时间 + to do sth
cards.example: It is easy to learn English. It takes me an hour to get there.

cards.front: 形容词/副词的比较级与最高级
cards.back:
比较：A is +比较级+ than B
最高级：A is the +最高级+ in/of
等级：A is as +原级+ as B（与…一样）
A is not as/so +原级+ as B（不如…）
cards.example: She is smarter than him. He is the tallest in the class. I am as tall as you.

cards.back:
直接→间接引语变化：
人称：I→he/she，my→his/her
时态退步：is→was，will→would，can→could
时间：now→then，today→that day
cards.example: She said 'I am happy' → She said (that) she was happy.

cards.back:
常见前缀：un-(unhappy)，re-(redo)，dis-(dislike)，im/in-(impossible)
常见后缀：-ful(helpful)，-less(useless)，-ness(kindness)，-tion(education)，-ly(quickly)
cards.example: unhappy, rebuild, dislike, useful, happiness, quickly

cards.back:
主语（S）+ 谓语（V）+ 宾语（O）
+ 表语（P）补足语（C）状语（A）
五种基本句型：SV/SVP/SVO/SVOO/SVOC
cards.example: She sings. (SV) He is tall. (SVP) I love her. (SVO)

cards.back:
肯定句 + 否定疑问？
否定句 + 肯定疑问？
原则：前肯后否，前否后肯，时态一致
cards.example: It is hot, isn't it? She can't swim, can she?

cards.back:
It is/was + 强调部分 + that + 其他
强调人时，可用who代替that
cards.example: It was Tom that broke the window. It is in the park that I met her.

cards.back:
名词/代词 + 现在分词/过去分词/形容词/名词
独立存在，修饰整个句子
cards.example: Weather permitting, we will go hiking. All things considered, it is a good plan.

cards.back:
就近原则：either…or/neither…nor/not only…but also
就远原则：as well as/with/along with
集合名词：team/class作整体用单数，作成员用复数
cards.hint: 谓语动词与主语在人称和数上保持一致
cards.example: Either you or he is right. The team is strong. The team are arguing.

cards.back:
where：表地点（先行词是地点）
when：表时间（先行词是时间）
why：表原因（先行词是reason）
cards.example: I know the place where he was born. I remember the day when we met.

cards.back:
as：①时间（当…时）②原因（因为）③方式（像…一样）
as…as（同等比较）
the same…as（和…相同）
cards.example: As she grew older, she became wiser. Do as I say. She is as tall as me.

cards.back:
基数词：one/two/three…twenty/hundred/thousand
序数词：first/second/third，第四开始+th
特殊：five→fifth，twelve→twelfth，twenty→twentieth
cards.example: the first lesson, the twenty-first century, May 1st
